description_long: This shotgun features a compact, futuristic design with a robust, metallic body and a dark, matte finish. The barrel is short and thick, with subtle ribbing and a slight taper towards the muzzle, giving it a powerful, close-quarters appearance. The grip is ergonomically curved and textured, likely for enhanced handling, and is integrated seamlessly into the frame. A circular, mechanical detail is present near the trigger area, suggesting a reinforced or stylized action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample protection for the trigger. Accents of blue or teal run along the body, adding a modern, high-tech aesthetic to the weapon.
description: A compact, futuristic shotgun with a short barrel, ergonomic grip, and dark metallic finish accented by blue highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the curved grip, short barrel, and blue accent lines.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle opening, barrel thickness, and the symmetry of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with clearer visibility of the trigger guard and mechanical details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the grip's curvature and the alignment of the barrel and frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with subtle ribbing and no visible venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, robust with smooth contours and no finger grooves
